query: SELECT agentName, agentRole, phase, action, status, durationMs, LEFT(content, 3000) as content_preview FROM agent_logs WHERE taskId = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM tasks WHERE status != 'clarifying') ORDER BY phase, id
